summary: All four hosted P0 smoke prompts completed through direct Foundry Responses REST with status completed and scripted content gates passing.

cases.notes: Returned hosted-agent status, Mission Control readiness boundary, Foundry /responses boundary, and a next action.
Returned a CFO Mission Control brief for budget variance, cash runway, blocked approval, owners, evidence, and escalation.
Returned required settings and readiness signals instead of the deterministic Microsoft IQ briefing path.
Explicitly labeled demo/deterministic context and avoided claims that email, Teams, or tenant queries were sent, posted, or read.

importantLimitations: Direct REST is the verified invocation path for this vNext hosted Responses route; the Foundry MCP agent_invoke helper previously returned internal errors for live hosted versions.

Graph/MCP, ACS/Teams voice, Application Insights/Log Analytics/Purview, Fabric/Power BI, durable storage, scheduler secret, and sub-agent endpoints were intentionally not included in the v10 hosted payload.
This P0 smoke proves hosted reachability, Azure OpenAI model routing, and bounded response behavior; it does not prove full production parity with the App Service Morgan.
